feature: VaultX PPV Money Flow — Re-Score After Fixes (2026-05-06 Session 2)

auto_fail_reasons: UX=3: Pollo output player wired but not yet live-verified; no progress indicator for PPV bundle runs

FT.reason: All 8 pipeline steps produce real outputs with real DB writes. polloGenerate() now correctly parses resp.data.taskId and resp.data.generations[0].url. buildPpvBundle returns enginesUsed[]. Deduction: Pollo completion not yet live-verified with a fresh task — old task IDs expired.

OQ.reason: PPV outputs are real MP4 files (full_video, teaser, censored_preview, thumbnail) served at HTTP 200. buildPpvBundle now submits Replicate Real-ESRGAN enhancement pass when REPLICATE_API_TOKEN present. Deduction: Replicate enhancement is async/fire-and-forget — enhanced output not yet confirmed delivered.

CV.reason: Full PPV bundle + save to vault + fan purchase (vaultx_ppv_purchases id=1, $18.50, completed) + unlock + distribution all working. enginesUsed[] now logged in every PPV bundle response.

RE.reason: Core flow reliable. kingcamAI.ts polloGenerate() fixed — no longer hangs on wrong response shape. polloRouter.ts getTaskStatus updates DB row on every poll. Deduction: Pollo jobs from previous sessions remain at 'waiting' (expired task IDs, not a code bug).

UX.reason: VaultXStudio.tsx AIVideoGeneratorMode now wired to trpc.pollo.generateVideo + trpc.pollo.getTaskStatus polling every 8s. VideoPlayer renders when videoUrl available. Image upload shown for Pollo models. Deduction: Not yet live-verified in browser; no progress bar for PPV bundle FFmpeg processing.
